_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Discord Bot • NodeJS
author: pterodactyl@stan1712.com
description: Node.js egg for Discord bots with git pull on startup, npm package management and optional bash pre-start script.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ 1 == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install; fi; if [[ ! -z "${START_BASH_FILE}" ]]; then bash ${START_BASH_FILE}; else /usr/local/bin/node /home/container/src/index.js; fi;

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

apt -y update
apt -y install -y git curl ca-certificates

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo "-- Server installed"

variables.name: Additional Node Packages
variables.description: Additional npm packages to install on startup, space-separated (e.g. express lodash). Leave empty to skip.

variables.name: Uninstall Node Packages
variables.description: npm packages to uninstall on startup, space-separated. Leave empty to skip.

variables.name: Start Bash File
variables.description: Optional bash script to run instead of node (e.g. start.sh). Leave empty to run node /home/container/src/index.js directly.
